title: slack-channel channel_mappings.json
description: Authoritative schema for the channel binding registry persisted at <GC_CITY_PATH>/.gc/slack-channel/channel_mappings.json. The slack-channel adapter is the sole writer (via the bind-dm / bind-room verb endpoints) and reader (on the inbound path). The JSON object key is the composite '<workspace_id>:<channel_id>'. A message arriving in a bound channel is delivered to every session in session_ids.

workspace_id.description: Slack workspace (team) id, e.g. T0123456. Required component of the composite key.

channel_id.description: Slack channel or DM id, e.g. C0123456 or D0123456. Required component of the composite key.

kind.description: Conversation kind. 'dm' for direct-message bindings (bind-dm), 'room' for channel bindings (bind-room).

session_ids.description: Sorted, deduplicated gc session ids that receive every message in the bound channel. Whitespace is not allowed in a session id. At least one is required.

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the first successful binding for this key. Idempotent re-binds preserve this value.

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the most recent successful binding for this key. Re-binds advance this in place.
